node -e "const K='sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH',H={apikey:K,Authorization:'Bearer '+K};(async()=>{const B='http://127.0.0.1:54321/rest/v1';const a=await (await fetch(B+'/image_analyses?select=punto_id,image_urls,image_url&limit=40',{headers:H})).json();const pids=new Set(a.map(x=>x.punto_id).filter(Boolean));console.log('image_analyses rows:',a.length,'| distinct punto_id:',pids.size);console.log('sample punto_ids:',[...pids].slice(0,5).join(', '));console.log('rows with image_urls length>1:',a.filter(x=>Array.isArray(x.image_urls)&&x.image_urls.length>1).length);console.log('rows with null punto_id:',a.filter(x=>!x.punto_id).length);const puntos=await (await fetch(B+'/puntos_ferroviarios?select=id',{headers:H})).json();const existIds=new Set(puntos.map(p=>p.id));const orphan=[...pids].filter(id=>!existIds.has(id));console.log('total puntos_ferroviarios:',puntos.length,'| orphan analyses whose punto is gone:',orphan.length)})()"

py -3 -c "from PIL import Image; import statistics as s; im=Image.open(r'C:\Users\YOGA-01\Documents\Frontend\calibra.png').convert('RGB'); px=list(im.getdata()); ns=[sum(p)/3 for p in px]; print('size',im.size); print('mean',round(sum(ns)/len(ns),1)); print('stdev',round(s.pstdev(ns),1)); print('min',min(ns),'max',max(ns)); h=im.histogram(); print('frac_negro',round(sum(h[:15])/len(ns),3))"
